---
title: "AmyloGraphAB"
execute: 
  echo: false 
  warning: false 
---

# Getting started

The AmyloGraph Antibody Database collects peer-reviewed experimental information on the impact of amyloid-targeting antibodies have on the amyloid aggregation.

[Interactions](./interactions.html): list of all amyloid-antibody interactions.

[Amyloids](./amyloids.html): list of all amyloids involved in these interactions (named utilized common amyloid nomenclature).

[Antibodies](./antibodies.html): list of all antibodies involved in these interactions.

## Download

All source data files can be downloaded from their respective tables. The complete database in the .json format is available [here](https://github.com/BioGenies/AmyloGraphAB/blob/main/data/Interactions.json). All curated information is completely reuseable under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International licence.

## Data source

The AmyloGraph Antibody Database contains over 450 interactions between 18 unique amyloids and 436 antibodies (including amyloid-reducing evidence for most of the clinically assessed monoclonal antibodies), derived from 251 studies. Read more about the data curation [here](./curation.html).
